name: mcp-sam-gov
description: Keyless-first: 150 tools for US federal + state/local (SLED) government contracting, spending, regulation & partner vetting.
long_description: One-click Claude Desktop extension for US-government business intelligence — 150 tools, no API key. Search federal AND state/local (SLED) solicitations (SAM.gov, Grants.gov, OpenGov, Bonfire); analyze spending and awards (USAspending, FPDS); vet a partner across sanctions, exclusions, single-audit findings, bank health, and environmental compliance (OFAC, SAM, FAC, FDIC, EPA); check product recalls (openFDA, NHTSA, CPSC); pull litigation (CourtListener); and read regulation (Federal Register, eCFR, FAR/DFARS, NIST 800-53). Anti-hallucination autocomplete keeps NAICS/agency/recipient answers grounded. Honesty-hardened: totals are never a page length, outages throw instead of returning empty, and a missing value is null (never a fabricated $0). Keyless by default; optional free keys (Census, FRED, BEA, DOL, and others) only raise rate limits.

tools.name: sam_get_opportunity
tools.description: Full detail for a SAM.gov notice (SOW, POCs, attachments)

tools.name: usas_search_individual_awards
tools.description: Line-item federal contract awards (recipient, amount, state)

tools.name: usas_search_awards_by_recipient
tools.description: A recipient's win history at an agency × NAICS slice

tools.name: usas_search_subawards
tools.description: Subcontracts on prime awards — supply-chain map

tools.name: fdic_institution_financials
tools.description: FDIC bank health / financials for partner vetting

tools.name: openfda_enforcement
tools.description: FDA recalls/enforcement against a supplier's products

tools.name: fed_register_search_documents
tools.description: Search Federal Register rules and notices

sam_gov_api_key.title: SAM.gov API key (optional)
sam_gov_api_key.description: Leave blank for keyless mode. Set only for higher SAM.gov rate limits or archives older than 12 months.

census_api_key.title: Census API key (optional)
census_api_key.description: Optional free key for Census business-patterns tools.

fred_api_key.title: FRED API key (optional)
fred_api_key.description: Optional free key for FRED economic-series tools.

bea_api_key.title: BEA API key (optional)
bea_api_key.description: Optional free key for BEA regional/industry economic tools.

dol_api_key.title: DOL API key (optional)
dol_api_key.description: Optional free key for DOL data-endpoint tools.

data_gov_api_key.title: api.data.gov key (optional)
data_gov_api_key.description: Optional free key; raises DEMO_KEY limits for DOL and govinfo tools.
